name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no guilt, no pressure. Dental visits are personal, and we'd rather you come back when it feels right than feel chased.

If and when you do, here's 20% off your next visit on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for 14 days at checkout — works on a cleaning, a consultation, or whatever you need. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel less scary, and we'd love another chance to do that for you.

If something specific didn't sit right last time, just hit reply. A real person reads every message, and we genuinely want to know.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
